arts.ttl: Spain vs Netherlands – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Spain host the Netherlands in the second leg of their UEFA Nations League quarter-final tie tonight. La Roja rescued a result in Rotterdam on Thursday night after Mikel Merino’s stoppage-time equaliser.
